evals.prompt: I'm getting 'toomanyrequests: You have reached your unauthenticated pull rate limit' when doing az acr build on our cafehyna ACR registry. The Dockerfile pulls FROM nginx:1.25 directly from Docker Hub. How do I fix this so all pulls stay within ACR?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend importing nginx:1.25 into cafehyna ACR with az acr import, updating the Dockerfile FROM to cafehyna.azurecr.io/<path>/nginx:1.25, and rebuilding with az acr build.

evals.prompt: I need to run a security scan on our container image cafehyna.azurecr.io/apps/myapp:2.0.0 but we don't have Docker running locally. Can you scan it for vulnerabilities?
evals.expected_output: Should suggest running Trivy via ACR task (importing trivy image first if needed) or using trivy with --image-src remote. Should show how to analyze CRITICAL/HIGH findings.

evals.prompt:
Review this Dockerfile for security issues:
FROM ubuntu:latest
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y openssh-server curl
RUN sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
RUN curl https://example.com/tool/latest/download | bash
EXPOSE 22
CMD ["/usr/sbin/sshd", "-D"]
evals.expected_output: Should identify: unpinned base image, password SSH auth enabled, curl|bash without verification, running as root, no version pinning on tool. Should provide hardened version.
